name: Harmonie
description: Generate Jellyfin playlists from harmonie audio similarity. Name a playlist [RADIO] for similar-track radio, or [DRIFT] for a gradually-evolving mix.
overview: Build playlists from harmonie audio similarity.

versions.changelog: ### Features  - Refresh on track reorder via 30s polling backstop (6aef9fb)
### Features  - Refresh on track reorder via 30s polling backstop (6aef9fb)
### Features  - Cluster style playlists with k-means and combined-style titles (550908e)
### Features  - Cluster style playlists with k-means and combined-style titles (550908e)
### Features  - Add per-user style cluster playlists with daily auto-refresh (9bedff2)
### Features  - Add per-user style cluster playlists with daily auto-refresh (9bedff2)
### Features  - Add mix playlists seeded from jellyfin listening history (8bc8c12)
### Features  - Add mix playlists seeded from jellyfin listening history (8bc8c12)
### Features  - Expose playlist generation defaults in plugin settings (003ba98)
### Features  - Expose playlist generation defaults in plugin settings (003ba98)
### Features  - Simplify to radio and drift playlists, adapt to new harmonie api (9910c73)
